zh.lifeSummary: 當Mazera de Bisege於1210年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾巴德斯利 克林頓時，她的父親James Bisege26歲，母親Matilda30歲。她於大約1230年與Thomas Clinton在英國萊希斯特斯爾武洛斯索普結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。她去世於1278年1月12日在英國斯塔福爾阿敏頓享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mazera de Bisege于1210年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾巴德斯利 克林頓时，她的父亲James Bisege26岁，母亲Matilda30岁。她于大约1230年与Thomas Clinton在英国萊希斯特斯爾武洛斯索普结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。她去世于1278年1月12日在英国斯塔福爾阿敏頓享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mazera
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Polish: nickname from Old Polish mizera ‘wickedness; misery’.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Mazera de Bisege was born in 1210, in Baddesley Clinton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, James Bisege, was 26 and her mother, Matilda, was 30. She married Thomas Clinton about 1230, in Ullesthorpe, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. She died on 12 January 1278, in Amington, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mazera de Bisege est née en 1210, à Baddesley Clinton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, James Bisege, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Matilda, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Clinton environ 1230, à Ullesthorpe, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Elle est décédée le 12 janvier 1278, à Amington, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Mazera de Bisegeが1210年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアバッドエスリー クリントンで生まれた時，父James Bisegeは26歳，母Matildaは30歳であった。約1230年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアウレスソルペでThomas Clintonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼女は1278年1月12日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアアミントンで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mazera de Bisege(이)가 1210년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 바데슬리 클린턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Bisege(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1230년 영국 레이스스터실르 울레스소에서 Thomas Clinton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1278년 1월 12일 영국 스태퍼드실르 아밍턴에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mazera de Bisege nasceu em 1210, em Baddesley Clinton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, James Bisege, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Matilda, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Clinton aproximadamente 1230, em Ullesthorpe, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ela faleceu em 12 de janeiro de 1278, em Amington, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mazera de Bisege родилась в 1210 г. в местности баддесли клинтон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени James Bisege было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Clinton около 1230 г. в местности уллестаурп, лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Она умерла 12 января 1278 г. в местности амингтон, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 68 лет.
